;<span id="Retention">retention</span>
:proportion of knowledge retained in memory at any given time. '''Retention''' is greater than 100% minus the [[Glossary:Forgetting_index|forgetting index]]. The forgetting index refers to the probability of forgetting at the moment of a [[Glossary:Repetition|repetition]] while '''retention''' refers to the average recall probability between the last and the next repetition. For an exact formula linking the [[Glossary:Forgetting_index|forgetting index]] and the '''retention''' see: [https://super-memory.com/articles/theory.htm#Retention Theoretical aspects of SuperMemo]. '''Retention''' equals 100% minus the [[Glossary:Forgetting_index|forgetting index]] only when measured on [[Glossary:Item|items]] repeated on a single day (e.g. as displayed in '''[[Toolkit menu|Toolkit]] : [[Calendar]]''')
